text:
Purify (, rom. Pyurifai) is a spell card found in the Greed Island game. It allows the caster to return a transformed card to its original state.
__NOTOC__

Card Info

!Card Effect:
| colspan="3" align="center" |Dispel effect of transformation spell and return card to original form. (If, after transformation, the card limit is exceeded, the card changes to item form and cannot be converted again. In the case of a spell card, it disappears unless the spell is used immediately.)
|
|-
!How to Obtain:
| colspan="3" align="center" |Purchasable at the Spell Card Shop in Masadora.
|
|}

Summary

This spell reverts a card that is currently transformed by "Clone", "Mimic", or "Fake". If the restored card is maxed out, it reverts into the item and it cannot be converted into card form again. If it is a spell card, it it will be destroyed unless the spell can be used immediately. It is useful in trades if one does not possess a Paladin's Necklace, although it also restores cards transformed with "Clone" or "Mimic".

Card Description

{| class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0"
![Jap]
|No.1034 :: 
攻撃呪文による変身を無効化し、元に戻す。（元に戻したカードが限界枚数ＭＡＸだった場合、アイテムとして戻り、その後カード化は出来ない。呪文カードが限界枚数ＭＡＸでアイテムとして戻った場合、その呪文が使える状況になければ破壊される。）
|-
![Eng]
|No.1034 :: Purify 
Attack spells due to transformations and changed into with no effect, are reverted to its original. (In the situation where the reverted card's transformation limit is MAX, the item when restored, cannot go back. In the situation where a Spell Card's transformation limit is MAX, that spell is destroyed unless used in its circumstances.)
|}
